purpose: Resolve artifact and cell-scope ambiguities before any formal result exists; this proposal does not change or pass the frozen parent protocol.

proposed_artifact_taxonomy.applies_to: A learned variant that changes the supervised target, training retrieval conditioning, H/K layout, or training time view.
proposed_artifact_taxonomy.required_primary_artifact: complete model/optim/scheduler/trainer DCP at optimizer step 7000

proposed_artifact_taxonomy.applies_to: retrieval_only, which has no optimizer by frozen definition
proposed_artifact_taxonomy.required_primary_artifact: immutable method manifest binding pool, index, alignment, projection, seed-controlled tie-breaking, code, and output hashes

proposed_artifact_taxonomy.applies_to: Pool-size, top-k, corruption severity, resolution preprocessing, and other variants that do not update model parameters under the approved scope rule.
proposed_artifact_taxonomy.required_primary_artifact: immutable evaluation manifest binding the exact parent checkpoint payload SHA256 and all evaluator/data/index hashes

proposed_artifact_taxonomy.applies_to: Hierarchical statistics, qualitative best/worst selection, and failure taxonomy
proposed_artifact_taxonomy.required_primary_artifact: report manifest binding every contributing task-seed evaluation artifact; no missing-cell imputation

learned_training_checkpoint_rules.blocking_definition: future_state target/loss/reconstruction is not yet approved
feature, encoder, index, aggregation, and tie-break contracts are not yet approved
frozen visual encoder checkpoint and exact feature extraction are not yet approved

proposed_minimum_claim_centered_scope.count_interpretation: Minimum claim-centered proposal, not the literal full method-by-every-variant cross-product. Approval is required before registry generation.

proposed_evaluation_scope.main_comparison: Four methods at pool size 10 for every seed and held-out task.
proposed_evaluation_scope.pool_growth: recap_hand_ret at nested pool sizes 0/1/2/4/8/10 for every seed and held-out task; baseline handling at pool0 must be approved.
proposed_evaluation_scope.window_aggregation: one preregistered median per heldout task and seed before inference testing
proposed_evaluation_scope.inference_seed_rule: formal run seed controls sampler noise, retrieval tie-breaking, and all stochastic preprocessing
proposed_evaluation_scope.qualitative_selection: 3 best and 3 worst task-seed cases per heldout task using the preregistered primary metric

blocking_open_decisions.required_choice: Approve the minimum claim-centered applicability rules above or require a literal method-by-every-variant cross-product.
blocking_open_decisions.impact: Changes the learned checkpoint count and total GPU time by a large factor.

blocking_open_decisions.required_choice: Approve a nonlearned method manifest as the retrieval_only primary artifact instead of a logically impossible optimizer checkpoint.
blocking_open_decisions.impact: Required to make the frozen nonlearned definition and P2 completeness condition jointly executable.

blocking_open_decisions.required_choice: Freeze a future_state representation distinct from both direct absolute future trajectory and aligned-plan residual.
blocking_open_decisions.recommended_candidate: Predict per-step state transitions relative to the preceding state and reconstruct the canonical future trajectory by cumulative composition from the current robot state.
blocking_open_decisions.impact: Defines the supervised target, inverse transform, metrics, and checkpoint compatibility.

blocking_open_decisions.required_choice: Freeze leakage-safe query/pool features for random, phase, geometry, visual, and geometry_plus_visual retrieval.
blocking_open_decisions.impact: No geometry or visual result is valid without exact feature and encoder hashes.

blocking_open_decisions.required_choice: Freeze executable materialization and train-versus-evaluate rules for action views, H/K layouts, time views/corruptions, and resolution preprocessors.
blocking_open_decisions.impact: Determines dataset schemas, checkpoint compatibility, and whether an artifact is a learned checkpoint or checkpoint-linked evaluation.

blocking_open_decisions.required_choice: Freeze the formal held-out inference sampler, action extraction/inverse normalization, top-k prediction aggregation, guardrail, and output schemas.
blocking_open_decisions.impact: Training checkpoints alone cannot support any registered P2 metric or claim.

next_state_transition.after_approval: Create a v1 frozen supplement, lock its SHA256, generate the exact full cell registry, implement registry contract tests, and only then permit formal queue preparation.
